TEXT.id: 8. ko nimanokzos so asa ka kois
TEXT.citation: Rau, D. V., & Dong, M. N. (2006). Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary. Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{rau2006yami, title={Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary}, author={Rau, D Victoria and Dong, Maa-Neu}, year={2006}, publisher={Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica}}
TEXT.source: ['8. ko nimanokzos so asa ka kois', '我射死了一隻豬', 'I killed a pig', '', 'si apen Ogaog (M, 69, Iranmilek)', '黃馬期，男，69，東清村', '']

S.FORM: mi-ci-ciwciw namen a ka-k-anak-an am, ma-níring si Akay ta icialaw am,
S.PHON: mi-ci-ciwciw namən a ka-k-anak-an am, ma-n*riŋ ʂi akaj ta icialaw am,
S.FORM: mi-ci-ciwciw namen a ka-k-anak-an am, ma-níring si Akay ta icialaw am,
S.PHON: mi-ʨi-ʨiwʨiw namən a ka-k-anak-an am, ma-n*ɻiŋ ɕi akaj ta iʨialaw am,
S.TRANSL: 當我們一群小孩子正在追逐玩耍的時候，我的祖父就說，
A group of us kids were fooling around when my grandfather said,

S.FORM: "imo rana, manga apo ko am, ángay pala do ora ta, ta si m-ian so ma-ngay do ora ta am, to mo na vonó-a an" koan na yaken a.
S.PHON: "imo~u rana, maŋa apo~u ko~u am, *ŋaj pala ɖo~u o~ura ta, ta ʂi m-ian ʂo~u ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~ura ta am, to~u mo~u na vo~un*-a an" ko~uan na jakən a.
S.FORM: "imo rana, manga apo ko am, ángay pala do ora ta, ta si m-ian so ma-ngay do ora ta am, to mo na vonó-a an" koan na yaken a.
S.PHON: "imo~u ɻana, maŋa apo~u ko~u am, *ŋaj pala ɖo~u o~uɻa ta, ta ɕi m-ian ʂo~u ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~uɻa ta am, to~u mo~u na fo~un*-a an" ko~uan na jakən a.
S.TRANSL: “親愛的孫子，你去看看我們的芋田，如果有豬進到我們的田裡，你就戳了它的眼睛” 祖父這樣跟我說
“Dear Grandson, go in our taro field and see if any pigs are around. If there is one, poke out its eyes.”

S.FORM: "a ji sia mang-avay", "a i-pang-avay da no ma-ngay do ora ta" koan na.
S.PHON: "a ʥi ʂia maŋ-avaj", "a i-paŋ-avaj ɖa no~u ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~ura ta" ko~uan na.
S.FORM: "a ji sia mang-avay", "a i-pang-avay da no ma-ngay do ora ta" koan na.
S.PHON: "a ʥi ɕia maŋ-afaj", "a i-paŋ-afaj ɖa no~u ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~uɻa ta" ko~uan na.
S.TRANSL: “他們（飼主）會罵人（我們）呢？” “是他們的（豬）進入我們田裡呢，怎麼還罵人？” 他說
“Won’t they (the owners of the pigs) be angry (with us)?” “If (their pigs) are intruding our field, they can’t blame us.”

S.FORM: "nohon, a ajin o cinalolot?" "a ori do dang", k-owsok ko rana.
S.PHON: "no~uʁo~un, a aʥin o~u cinalo~ulo~ut?" "a o~uri ɖo~u ɖaŋ", k-o~uwʂo~uk ko~u rana.
S.FORM: "nohon, a ajin o cinalolot?" "a ori do dang", k-owsok ko rana.
S.PHON: "no~uɰo~un, a aʥin o~u ʨinalo~ulo~ut?" "a o~uɻi ɖo~u ɖaŋ", k-o~uwʂo~uk ko~u ɻana.
S.TRANSL: “好吧，那長矛呢？” “在那裡！” ，我（拿了長矛）就下去了
“Okay, where’s the spear?” “There.” So I took it and went to the fields.

S.FORM: mi-ke-yray a rako a aviik do atngeh no aviao am, "nona, o ya o mi ko", to ko pang-sad-a.
S.PHON: mi-kə-jraj a rako~u a aviik ɖo~u atŋəʁ no~u aviao~u am, "no~una, o~u ja o~u mi ko~u", to~u ko~u paŋ-ʂaɖ-a.
S.FORM: mi-ke-yray a rako a aviik do atngeh no aviao am, "nona, o ya o mi ko", to ko pang-sad-a.
S.PHON: mi-kə-jɻaj a ɻako~u a afiik ɖo~u atŋəɰ no~u afiao~u am, "no~una, o~u ja o~u mi ko~u", to~u ko~u paŋ-ʂaɖ-a.
S.TRANSL: 兩隻公豬在蘆葦叢下一起睡覺，我想“嗯，這就是我要 的” ，於是就刺了下去
Two hogs were lying under the reeds asleep, and I thought, “Here is a pig I can stick ”and I raised my spear and struck it.

S.FORM: "yik" koan na, "wo, ásio ya? ji mang-avay sira do ya ji ni-ma-ngay do ora namen ori", to mi-ikik a, am ásio pa a, ni-ma-wákwak rana.
S.PHON: "jik" ko~uan na, "wo~u, *ʂio~u ja? ʥi maŋ-avaj ʂira ɖo~u ja ʥi ni-ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~ura namən o~uri", to~u mi-ikik a, am *ʂio~u pa a, ni-ma-w*kwak rana.
S.FORM: "yik" koan na, "wo, ásio ya? ji mang-avay sira do ya ji ni-ma-ngay do ora namen ori", to mi-ikik a, am ásio pa a, ni-ma-wákwak rana.
S.PHON: "jik" ko~uan na, "wo~u, *ɕio~u ja? ʥi maŋ-afaj ɕiɻa ɖo~u ja ʥi ni-ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~uɻa namən o~uɻi", to~u mi-ikik a, am *ɕio~u pa a, ni-ma-w*kwak ɻana.
S.TRANSL: 豬“咿咿” 的叫著，“噢，完了，它沒有到我們的田裡（卻被我刺殺了），一定會被人罵慘了？” ，豬繼續的咿咿叫，它哪裡還有什麼（命）？死了

The hog started squealing loudly, and I thought, “Oh, no! It wasn’t even in our field yet, and I killed it. Its owner will be very angry!” The pig continued squealing. How could it be still alive? The pig died.

S.FORM: m-oli ko rana am, "mo Akay!" "ikongo ang?"
S.PHON: m-o~uli ko~u rana am, "mo~u akaj!" "iko~uŋo~u aŋ?"
S.FORM: m-oli ko rana am, "mo Akay!" "ikongo ang?"
S.PHON: m-o~uli ko~u ɻana am, "mo~u akaj!" "iko~uŋo~u aŋ?"
S.TRANSL: 我回家後，“祖父！” “什麼事？”
I went back home and said, “Grandpa!” “What?”

S.FORM: "ya ko ni-wakwak o ya asa ka aviik", "a ya ni-ma-ngay do ora ta?"
S.PHON: "ja ko~u ni-wakwak o~u ja aʂa ka aviik", "a ja ni-ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~ura ta?"
S.FORM: "ya ko ni-wakwak o ya asa ka aviik", "a ya ni-ma-ngay do ora ta?"
S.PHON: "ja ko~u ni-wakwak o~u ja aʂa ka afiik", "a ja ni-ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~uɻa ta?"
S.TRANSL: “我刺死了一隻豬” ，“它進到我們的田裡了嗎？”
“I killed a pig!” “Was it in our field?”

S.FORM: "beken, sia mi-ke-yray am, ko todey vono-a",
S.PHON: "bəkən, ʂia mi-kə-jraj am, ko~u to~uɖəj vo~uno~u-a",
S.FORM: "beken, sia mi-ke-yray am, ko todey vono-a",
S.PHON: "bəkən, ɕia mi-kə-jɻaj am, ko~u to~uɖəj fo~uno~u-a",
S.TRANSL: “沒有，它們兩個正在睡覺的時候，我就戳了它的眼睛”
“No, they were under the reeds asleep, and I poked its eyes.”

S.FORM: "a ji da 'oya-n imo, mo tamazang a, beken o ma-ngay do ora ta o vono-en mo, manga apo ko a, apia ori?"
S.PHON: "a ʥi ɖa ʔo~uja-n imo~u, mo~u tamaʐaŋ a, bəkən o~u ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~ura ta o~u vo~uno~u-ən mo~u, maŋa apo~u ko~u a, apia o~uri?"
S.FORM: "a ji da 'oya-n imo, mo tamazang a, beken o ma-ngay do ora ta o vono-en mo, manga apo ko a, apia ori?"
S.PHON: "a ʥi ɖa ʔo~uja-n imo~u, mo~u tamaɻaŋ a, bəkən o~u ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~uɻa ta o~u fo~uno~u-ən mo~u, maŋa apo~u ko~u a, apia o~uɻi?"
S.TRANSL: “你這樣子會被人家罵呢，孫子；我是說只有進到我們田裡的豬才要戳它的眼睛；這下怎麼辦呢？”
“I said you could poke out it’s eyes if it was in the field, but what you did will anger the owner, my dear grandson! What will I do?”

S.FORM: "a k-om-oan am, mo ni-panci yaken ang", "beken a ma-ngay do ora ta o".
S.PHON: "a k-o~um-o~uan am, mo~u ni-panci jakən aŋ", "bəkən a ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~ura ta o~u".
S.FORM: "a k-om-oan am, mo ni-panci yaken ang", "beken a ma-ngay do ora ta o".
S.PHON: "a k-o~um-o~uan am, mo~u ni-panʨi jakən aŋ", "bəkən a ma-ŋaj ɖo~u o~uɻa ta o~u".
S.TRANSL: “有什麼辦法？是你這樣跟我說的啊” ，“不是，我是說只有進到我們田裡的才要
“There is nothing we can do about it! You told me to do it!” “I said if they were in the field.”

S.FORM: ika-doa na araw no nang am, makeynakan rana am, "a ji da yaten a 'oya-n, manga apo ko"
S.PHON: ika-ɖo~ua na araw no~u naŋ am, makəjnakan rana am, "a ʥi ɖa jatən a ʔo~uja-n, maŋa apo~u ko~u"
S.FORM: ika-doa na araw no nang am, makeynakan rana am, "a ji da yaten a 'oya-n, manga apo ko"
S.PHON: ika-ɖo~ua na aɻaw no~u naŋ am, makəjnakan ɻana am, "a ʥi ɖa jatən a ʔo~uja-n, maŋa apo~u ko~u"
S.TRANSL: 第二天，飼主就宰掉吃了那隻豬。“孫子啊，人家一定會來罵我們的”
The next day, the pig’s owner butchered it. “Grandson, they will definitely be angry.”

S.FORM: o kma so sang a, todey vono-a ni-pasoson da jiaken am,
S.PHON: o~u kma ʂo~u ʂaŋ a, to~uɖəj vo~uno~u-a ni-paʂo~uʂo~un ɖa ʥiakən am,
S.FORM: o kma so sang a, todey vono-a ni-pasoson da jiaken am,
S.PHON: o~u kma ʂo~u ʂaŋ a, to~uɖəj fo~uno~u-a ni-paʂo~uʂo~un ɖa ʥiakən am,
S.TRANSL: 像這樣的事情；本來祖父只是叫我去看看田裡是否有豬進入，我卻真的刺殺 了別人的豬。
Just like that. When they asked me to (check if any pigs entered our field), I killed one instead.

S.FORM: am ji ko a-tenng-i ta metdeh ko am,
S.PHON: am ʥi ko~u a-tənŋ-i ta mətɖəʁ ko~u am,
S.FORM: am ji ko a-tenng-i ta metdeh ko am,
S.PHON: am ʥi ko~u a-tənŋ-i ta mətɖəɰ ko~u am,
S.TRANSL: 只因當時還小，不懂事
At the time I was young and didn’t understand.

S.FORM: to ko i ma-nokzos so m-ian do ka-viao-an ori am, ori ni-'oya-an da niaken ni Akay icialaw.
S.PHON: to~u ko~u i ma-no~ukʐo~uʂ ʂo~u m-ian ɖo~u ka-viao~u-an o~uri am, o~uri ni-ʔo~uja-an ɖa niakən ni akaj icialaw.
S.FORM: to ko i ma-nokzos so m-ian do ka-viao-an ori am, ori ni-'oya-an da niaken ni Akay icialaw.
S.PHON: to~u ko~u i ma-no~ukɻo~uʂ ʂo~u m-ian ɖo~u ka-fiao~u-an o~uɻi am, o~uɻi ni-ʔo~uja-an ɖa niakən ni akaj iʨialaw.
S.TRANSL: 把好好睡在蘆葦叢下的豬給活活的刺死了，祖父因此對我很生氣
Because I killed the pig sleeping under the reeds, my late grandpa was angry with me.

S.FORM: karaan am, ko ji á-tenng-i a, ni-toro-an da so adoa ka mazaponay koan da sio an?
S.PHON: karaan am, ko~u ʥi *-tənŋ-i a, ni-to~uro~u-an ɖa ʂo~u aɖo~ua ka maʐapo~unaj ko~uan ɖa ʂio~u an?
S.FORM: karaan am, ko ji á-tenng-i a, ni-toro-an da so adoa ka mazaponay koan da sio an?
S.PHON: kaɻaan am, ko~u ʥi *-tənŋ-i a, ni-to~uɻo~u-an ɖa ʂo~u aɖo~ua ka maɻapo~unaj ko~uan ɖa ɕio~u an?
S.TRANSL: 後來怎麼樣我就不知道了；據說好像是賠了他們兩顆琉璃珠吧
Afterwards I don’t know what happened, but I heard that they paid (them) two blue beads.
